---
pagetitle: "Sofia Fabian"
page-layout: custom
resources:
  - agu_poster_2025.png
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: home.css
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

```{=html}
<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a class="nav-name" href="#top">Sofia Fabian</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#research">Research</a></li>
      <li><a href="#climaginative">Climaginative</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Water Sustainability &amp; Climate Resilience</p>
    <h1>I investigate how climate extremes reshape water systems and <em>what that means for us, and what can we do about it.</em></h1>
     <p class="hero-sub">I'm a Research Professor at University of Seoul. My research focuses on hydrology, particularly climate extremes and their relation to freshwater ecology. I work on understanding the impacts of extreme events on water resources and what adaptation looks like in practice. I am interested in the space where environmental science, policy, and industry meet, and in building research that is legible and useful across all three.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a class="btn btn-solid" href="#research">Research</a>
      <a class="btn btn-outline" href="mailto:psdfabian@gmail.com">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">
   
    <div class="sidebar-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pamelasofiafabian/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pamela-Sofia-Fabian" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
      <a href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/IXD-7923-2023" target="_blank">Web of Science</a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9196-212X" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/sofiefab" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BODY: two-column -->
<div class="body-wrap">

  <!-- MAIN -->
  <div class="main-col">
  
  

    <!-- RESEARCH -->
    <div id="research">
      <p class="section-tag">Research</p>

      <p class="sub-tag">SAMPLE PRESENTATIONS</p>
      <div class="pres-entry">
        <div class="pub-number">2025 · AGU Poster</div>
        <p><cite>2025 AGU Poster</cite> — <em>American Geophysical Union</em>, 2025</p>
        <img class="pres-img" src="agu_poster_2025.png" alt="2025 AGU Poster">
      </div>

      <p class="sub-tag spaced">SAMPLE PUBLICATIONS</p>
      <ol class="pub-list" reversed>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">Under review</div>
          <p><cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, YoonKyung Cha, Hyun-Han Kwon, 'Intra-annual chlorophyll-a dynamics under hydroclimatic extremes derived from a 44-year baseline: insights from a temperate river system (Nakdong River Basin, South Korea)', <em>Water Resources Research</em> <span class="under-review-tag">2nd stage</span></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">Under review</div>
          <p><cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, Hemie Cho, Yoo-Geun Ham, Hyun-Han Kwon, 'Climate-informed streamflow forecasting based on a Bayesian autoregressive exogenous stochastic volatility model and its use for hydrological drought forecasting', <em>Journal of Hydrology</em> <span class="under-review-tag">2nd stage</span></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">[5] · 2025</div>
          <p><cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, YoonKyung Cha, Kyung-A You, Hyun-Han Kwon, 'Spatiotemporal Dynamics of Summer Chlorophyll-a Concentrations Under Varying Drought Conditions in a Hierarchical Bayesian Model', <em>Chemical Engineering Journal</em> 2025.<br>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cej.2025.163074" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cej.2025.163074</a></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">[4] · 2024</div>
          <p>Hemie Cho, <cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, Sang-Hoon Lee, Kyung-A You, Hyun-Han Kwon, 'Decadal Trends and Predictive Insights into Aquatic Ecosystem Health in the Namhan River, South Korea: Longitudinal Analysis of Hydro-Environmental Factors and Stream Health Indices (2008–2022)', <em>Environmental Pollution</em> 2024.<br>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envpol.2024.125184" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envpol.2024.125184</a></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">[3] · 2023</div>
          <p><cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, Hyun-Han Kwon, Meththika Vithanage, Joo-Heon Lee, 'Modeling, challenges and strategies for understanding impacts of climate extremes (droughts and floods) on water quality in Asia: A review', <em>Environmental Research</em> 2023.<br>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2023.115617" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2023.115617</a></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">[2] · 2022</div>
          <p><cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, Dong Hoon Lee, Sang Wook Shin, and Joo-Hyon Kang, 'Assessment of Pyrene Adsorption on Biochars Prepared from Green Infrastructure Plants: Toward a Closed-Loop Recycling in Managing Toxic Stormwater Pollutants', <em>Journal of Water Process Engineering</em> 2022.<br>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jwpe.2022.102929" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jwpe.2022.102929</a></p>
        </li>

        <li class="pub-entry">
          <div class="pub-number">[1] · 2021</div>
          <p>Dong Hoon Lee, <cite>Pamela Sofia Fabian</cite>, Jin Hwi Kim, Joo-Hyon Kang, 'HSPF-Based Assessment of Inland Nutrient Source Control Strategies to Reduce Algal Blooms in Streams in Response to Future Climate Changes', <em>Sustainability</em> 2021.<br>
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/su132212413" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.3390/su132212413</a></p>
        </li>

      </ol>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /main-col -->

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <div class="side-col">

    <div class="side-panel">
      <div class="side-panel-label">Research interests</div>
      <p>Climate extremes and water quality dynamics. Drought-driven ecological change. Bayesian probabilistic modeling. Socio-hydrology and the translation of environmental modeling into policy-relevant insight.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="side-panel">
      <div class="side-panel-label">Contact</div>
      <p><a href="mailto:psdfabian@gmail.com">psdfabian@gmail.com</a></p>
    </div>

    <!-- CLIMAGINATIVE -->
    <div id="climaginative" class="clim-panel">
      <div class="clim-tag">Beyond the lab</div>
      <div class="clim-title">Cl<em>imaginative</em></div>
      <div class="clim-desc">Climate curiosity, without the doom. A project on why imagination might be the most underused tool in climate action.</div>
    </div>

    <!-- BLOG -->
    <a href="blog.html" class="clim-panel" style="display:block; text-decoration:none;">
      <div class="clim-tag">Writing</div>
      <div class="clim-title">Blog</div>
      <div class="clim-desc"><em>The joy is in the pursuit.</em></div>
    </a>

  </div><!-- /side-col -->

</div><!-- /body-wrap -->

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-name">Sofia Fabian</div>
    <ul class="footer-links">
      <li><a href="mailto:psdfabian@gmail.com">psdfabian@gmail.com</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pamelasofiafabian/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pamela-Sofia-Fabian" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/IXD-7923-2023" target="_blank">Web of Science</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9196-212X" target="_blank">ORCID</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://github.com/sofiefab" target="_blank">GitHub</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 Sofia Fabian</div>
  </div>
</footer>
```
